name: To the Moon Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Red hot cayenne pepper sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a Dutch oven.
2. Drain the excess fat.
3. Stir in the chili-o seasoning mix, water, diced tomatoes, and drained kidney beans.
4. Add the red hot cayenne pepper sauce.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and simmer, covered for 10 minutes.
7. Garnish with chopped green onions and shredded cheddar cheese if desired.
